# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir -p build
    - echo "Simulating compilation..."
    - echo "binary_content" > build/my_app_binary
    - echo "config_content" > build/app_config.txt
    - echo "Build completed."
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 30 days
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_staging_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts for staging deployment..."
    - echo "Deploying my_app_binary to staging environment..."
    - cat build/my_app_binary
    - echo "Deploying app_config.txt to staging environment..."
    - cat build/app_config.txt
    - echo "Staging deployment complete."
  needs:
    - build_job
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_production_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts for production deployment..."
    - echo "Deploying my_app_binary to production environment..."
    - cat build/my_app_binary
    - echo "Deploying app_config.txt to production environment..."
    - cat build/app_config.txt
    - echo "Production deployment complete."
  needs:
    - build_job
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker
